creator: sec@42.org
text:
On Sat, Oct 28, 2000 at 12:57:22PM +0200, Johan Karlsson wrote:
> Hi Stefan

Hi,

> I have just closed your PR 3299 from April 1997.
> I did this because your email address in that PR 
> 'sec@quit.42.org' is not valid.

Jep. This has been ages ago. %) Thanks for tracking me down anyway ;-)

> See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3299 
> for the deatils of the PR.
> 
> However, alot has happened with the console driver
> since the 2.2.1 days.
> 
> If this is still a problem in more recent version of 
> FreeBSD (for example 4.1-RELEASE) please open a new
> problem report.

I can't tell. I've been using a cheap monitor and a big video switch on
all my servers now instead of using the serial console. Let's keep this
closed for now.

CU,
    Sec
-- 
In 1968 it took the computing-Power of 2 C-64 to fly a rocket to the moon.
Now, 1997 it takes the Power of a Pentium 133 to run Microsoft Windows 95.
                    Something must have gone wrong.
